narrative:
Springboro City 2-A (precinct in Warren County) has 769 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.3 percentage points.
